Appearance
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

A24 is an American independent film production and distribution company based in New York City. It launched in August 2012, released its first film, A Glimpse Inside the Mind of Charles Swan III, in February 2013, and gained recognition with the box-office success of Spring Breakers that March.[1][2] In late 2013, they made deals with Amazon Prime Video and DirecTV Cinema for video-on-demand releases.

In 2016, they amassed seven Academy Award nominations for movies they distributed; Amy won Best Documentary, Ex Machina won Best Visual Effects, and Brie Larson received Best Actress for Room.[2][3] A24 also became a production studio that year, financing Moonlight in partnership with Plan B Entertainment;[4] that film earned critical acclaim and won three Academy Awards, including Best Picture.[5] Since then, the company has produced more original content and partnered with Apple TV+ and Showtime Networks for digital releases.[6][7]

Backrooms (2026) is A24's highest-grossing film worldwide with $301 million in box office earnings.[8] As of 2026,[update] On Becoming a Guinea Fowl (2024) is A24's highest-rated film on Rotten Tomatoes with a 100% approval rating, and Moonlight is its highest-scoring film on Metacritic with a 99 out of 100.[9][10]

Released films

[edit]

2010s

[edit]
Release date[a] Title Director(s) Synopsis Notes Ref.
February 8, 2013 A Glimpse Inside the Mind of Charles Swan III Roman Coppola The life of a graphic designer falls apart when his girlfriend breaks up with him. U.S. co-distribution with FilmBuff only [11][12]
March 15, 2013 Spring Breakers Harmony Korine During their spring break in Florida, four college-aged girls meet an eccentric drug dealer who lures them into a world of drugs, crime, and violence. U.S. co-distribution with Annapurna Pictures only [13][14]
Ginger & Rosa Sally Potter In 1960s London, amid the Cuban Missile Crisis, a teenager joins the anti-nuclear movement and becomes stressed when her father impregnates her teenage best friend. North American distribution only [15][16]
June 14, 2013 The Bling Ring Sofia Coppola A group of fame-obsessed teenagers known as the Bling Ring use social media to track celebrities and burgle their homes. U.S. distribution only [17][18]
August 2, 2013 The Spectacular Now James Ponsoldt A chance encounter between two high schoolers results in a romance blossoming. North American distribution only [19][20]
March 14, 2014 Enemy Denis Villeneuve The lives of two distinct men who look identical become intertwined. U.S. distribution only [21][22]
April 4, 2014 Under the Skin Jonathan Glazer An otherworldly woman preys on men in Scotland through seduction. [23][24]
April 25, 2014 Locke Steven Knight The life of a man unravels as he answers several phone calls on a drive to London. [25][26]
June 6, 2014 Obvious Child Gillian Robespierre After a one-night stand, a pregnant stand-up comedian decides to have an abortion. North American distribution only [27][28]
June 13, 2014 The Rover David Michôd Years after a global economic collapse, two men in Australia track down a gang that robbed them. U.S. distribution only [29][30]
August 15, 2014 Life After Beth Jeff Baena After his girlfriend dies and miraculously comes back to life, Zach takes the opportunity to experience all the things he regretted not doing with her before. [31][32]
September 19, 2014 Tusk Kevin Smith A podcaster is held captive by a reclusive individual who has a dark secret involving a walrus as his friends enlist a former Sûreté du Québec inspector to save him. [33][34]
October 24, 2014 Laggies Lynn Shelton When her high-school sweetheart proposes, an aimless 28-year-old panics and hides out in the home of her 16-year-old friend and her single father. North American distribution only [35][36]
Revenge of the Green Dragons Andrew Lau and Andrew Loo A Chinese immigrant rebels against the Chinatown gang he has been involved in since youth. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [37][38]
December 12, 2014 The Captive Atom Egoyan A nonlinear presentation of events taking place after the daughter of a man is kidnapped as a homicide detective helps to find her. U.S. distribution only [39][40]
December 31, 2014 A Most Violent Year J. C. Chandor The life of an oil company owner in 1981, where the streets of New York City are plagued by rampant political and industry corruption. [41][42]
January 16, 2015 Son of a Gun Julius Avery A man escapes prison with a notorious criminal and joins his gang to rob a gold mine. [43][44]
March 27, 2015 While We're Young Noah Baumbach A couple in their 40s develops a friendship with a couple in their 20s. [45][46]
April 3, 2015 Cut Bank Matt Shakman A couple witness a murder in Cut Bank, Montana. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [47][48]
April 10, 2015 Ex Machina Alex Garland A programmer is invited by his CEO to administer the Turing test to an advanced humanoid robot. U.S. distribution only [49][50]
May 15, 2015 Slow West John Maclean A young Scottish man searching for the woman he loves journeys across the American frontier alongside a bounty hunter. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [51][52]
May 29, 2015 Barely Lethal Kyle Newman A teenage intelligence agent at an organization run by her trainer yearns for a normal adolescence and moves in with a family as an exchange student while having to deal with an arms dealer and a rival orphan operative. [53][54]
July 3, 2015 Amy Asif Kapadia A documentary about British singer-songwriter Amy Winehouse. U.S. distribution only [55][56]
July 31, 2015 The End of the Tour James Ponsoldt The five-day interview between Rolling Stone reporter David Lipsky and novelist David Foster Wallace after the publication of the latter's Infinite Jest. [57][58]
August 7, 2015 Dark Places Gilles Paquet-Brenner A woman searches for the perpetrator who killed her mother and older sisters when she was a child. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [59][60]
September 25, 2015 Mississippi Grind Anna Boden and Ryan Fleck A down-on-his-luck gambler goes on a road trip with a young poker player. [61][62]
October 16, 2015 Room Lenny Abrahamson Held captive for several years by a man, a young woman and her son plot an escape. U.S. distribution only [63][64]
January 22, 2016 Mojave William Monahan A successful film director goes into the desert and runs into a homicidal drifter. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [65][66]
February 19, 2016 The Witch Robert Eggers In the 1630s, a Puritan family encounters forces of evil in the woods beyond their New England farm that appears in the form of a witch. [67][68]
March 11, 2016 Remember Atom Egoyan A Holocaust survivor with dementia sets out to kill a Nazi war criminal. U.S. distribution only [69][70]
March 18, 2016 Krisha Trey Edward Shults An old woman estranged from her family with a history of addiction returns for a Thanksgiving dinner in an attempt to reconcile with them. [71][72]
April 15, 2016 Green Room Jeremy Saulnier A group of Neo-Nazi skinheads trap a punk band after they witness a murder at a remote club. [73][74]
The Adderall Diaries Pamela Romanowsky An author with writer's block reconnects with his estranged father while investigating a murder case for his next book. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [75][76]
May 13, 2016 The Lobster Yorgos Lanthimos A man tries to form a relationship in a program where single people are turned into animals if they fail to find a partner in 45 days. U.S. distribution only [77][78]
June 10, 2016 De Palma Noah Baumbach and Jake Paltrow A documentary about American filmmaker Brian De Palma. [79][80]
June 24, 2016 Swiss Army Man Dan Kwan and Daniel Scheinert A man stranded on an island uses a corpse to escape. [81][82]
July 15, 2016 Equals Drake Doremus Two people fall in love in an emotionless dystopia. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [83][84]
July 29, 2016 Into the Forest Patricia Rozema Two sisters living with their father have their peaceful lives interrupted after a continent-wide power outage. [85][86]
August 19, 2016 Morris from America Chad Hartigan A 13-year-old American boy dreams of becoming a rapper while living in Germany with his soccer coach father. [87][88]
August 26, 2016 The Sea of Trees Gus Van Sant A suicidal American visits the Sea of Trees where he encounters an injured stranger. U.S. distribution only [89][90]
September 30, 2016 American Honey Andrea Arnold A teenage girl from a troubled home runs away with a traveling sales crew. [91][92]
October 21, 2016 Moonlight Barry Jenkins A black man grapples with his identity and sexuality in three stages of his life. Also produced by A24 [4][92]
October 26, 2016 Oasis: Supersonic Mat Whitecross The history of the Britpop band Oasis. U.S. distribution only [93][94]
November 11, 2016 The Monster Bryan Bertino A creature torments a mother stranded in their car at night. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [95][96]
December 28, 2016 20th Century Women Mike Mills Three women become involved in the upbringing of a teenage boy in 1970s Southern California. U.S. distribution only [97][98]
January 20, 2017 Trespass Against Us Adam Smith The son of an outlaw searches for a better future for his young son. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [99][100]
March 31, 2017 The Blackcoat's Daughter Oz Perkins Two girls stranded at their boarding school during winter face an unseen evil force. [101][102]
April 21, 2017 Free Fire Ben Wheatley An arms deal gone wrong between the IRA and an arms dealer group leads to a shootout. U.S. distribution only [103][104]
May 5, 2017 The Lovers Azazel Jacobs A married couple cheating on each other falls in love again. Also produced by A24 [105][106]
June 2, 2017 The Exception David Leveaux A Wehrmacht officer falls in love with a Jewish maid while looking for a spy. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [107][108]
June 16, 2017 It Comes at Night Trey Edward Shults A family hiding in a forest from a mysterious disease gives refuge to another family. Also produced by A24 [109][110]
July 7, 2017 A Ghost Story David Lowery A man dies, becomes a ghost, and remains in the house he shares with his wife. [111][112]
July 28, 2017 Menashe Joshua Z Weinstein A widowed Hasidic Jewish man tries to regain custody of his 10-year-old son. U.S. and Chinese distribution only [113][114]
August 11, 2017 Good Time Safdie brothers A bank robber tries to free his brother from police custody while eluding capture. North American, U.K. and Irish distribution only [115][116]
September 22, 2017 Woodshock Kate and Laura Mulleavy A woman copes with her mother's loss by using a potent drug. U.S. distribution only [117][118]
October 6, 2017 The Florida Project Sean Baker A 6-year-old girl lives with her unemployed single mother in a motel in Florida. [119][120]
October 20, 2017 The Killing of a Sacred Deer Yorgos Lanthimos A cardiac surgeon befriends an ill-intentioned teenager with a connection to his past. North American distribution only [121][122]
November 3, 2017 Lady Bird Greta Gerwig The coming-of-age of a high school senior with a strained relationship with her mother. [123][124]
December 1, 2017 The Disaster Artist James Franco The unlikely friendship between Tommy Wiseau and Greg Sestero results in the production of The Room, widely considered one of the worst films ever made. North American distribution only [125][126]
December 15, 2017 The Ballad of Lefty Brown Jared Moshe A cowboy recruits a young gunslinger and an old friend to avenge the murder of his partner. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [127][128]
March 2, 2018 The Vanishing of Sidney Hall Shawn Christensen A detective searches for the missing bestselling author Sidney Hall. [129][130]
March 30, 2018 The Last Movie Star Adam Rifkin An aging former movie star accepts an invitation to a small film festival. North American co-distribution with DirecTV only [131][132]
April 6, 2018 Lean on Pete Andrew Haigh A 15-year-old boy begins to work at a stable and befriends an ailing racehorse owned by its trainer. North American distribution only [133][134]
April 27, 2018 Backstabbing for Beginners Per Fly A United Nations employee uncovers a global conspiracy involving Iraq's oil reserves. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [135][136]
May 18, 2018 First Reformed Paul Schrader A Protestant minister endures a crisis of faith caused by mounting despair. U.S. distribution only [137][138]
May 25, 2018 How to Talk to Girls at Parties John Cameron Mitchell In 1970s London, a shy teenager befriends a rebellious alien. [139][140]
June 8, 2018 Hereditary Ari Aster An evil presence afflicts a grieving family. Also produced by A24 [141][142]
June 29, 2018 Woman Walks Ahead Susanna White In the 1890s, a portrait painter travels to the Dakotas to paint a portrait of Sitting Bull and becomes embroiled in the Lakota peoples' struggle over their land rights. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [143][144]
July 13, 2018 Eighth Grade Bo Burnham A teenager with anxiety strives for social acceptance in the last week of middle school. Also produced by A24 [145][146]
July 27, 2018 Hot Summer Nights Elijah Bynum In the summer of 1991, a teenage boy becomes entangled in the drug trade. co-distribution with DirecTV only [147][148]
August 3, 2018 Never Goin' Back Augustine Frizzell Two high school dropouts take a week off their waitressing jobs to go to the beach. [149][150]
August 10, 2018 A Prayer Before Dawn Jean-Stéphane Sauvaire English boxer Billy Moore is incarcerated in a notorious maximum security prison in Thailand and participates in a Muay Thai tournament for a chance to get out. North American co-distribution with DirecTV only [151][152]
September 10, 2018 Slice Austin Vesely In a town with ghosts, locals set out to solve the murders of pizza deliverymen. [153][154]
September 14, 2018 The Children Act Richard Eyre A judge receives the case of a teenager refusing an operation on religious principle. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [155][156]
October 19, 2018 Mid90s Jonah Hill In 1990s Los Angeles, a 13-year-old boy befriends an older group of skateboarders. Also produced by A24 [157][158]
February 1, 2019 Outlaws Stephen McCallum A man betrays the leader of a motorcycle club to save the life of his brother. North American co-distribution with DirecTV only [159][160]
March 1, 2019 The Hole in the Ground Lee Cronin A mother fears the increasingly disturbing behavior of her son is linked to a sinkhole. [161][162]
Climax Gaspar Noé At an after-party, a French dance troupe consumes sangria spiked with LSD. U.S. distribution only [163][164]
March 8, 2019 Gloria Bell Sebastián Lelio A middle-aged divorcée in Los Angeles enters an unexpected romance with another divorcée. [165][166]
April 5, 2019 High Life Claire Denis A group of criminals on a space mission travels towards a black hole. North American distribution only [167][168]
April 6, 2019 Native Son Rashid Johnson A modern retelling of the novel Native Son, a young black man named Bigger Thomas takes a job as the live-in chauffeur to a white family in Chicago. Also produced by A24; distributed by HBO Films [169][170]
April 19, 2019 Under the Silver Lake David Robert Mitchell A man interested in hidden messages investigates the sudden disappearance of his neighbor only to stumble upon a dangerous conspiracy. North American distribution only [171][172]
May 17, 2019 The Souvenir Joanna Hogg A film student begins a relationship with an older man. [173][174]
June 7, 2019 The Last Black Man in San Francisco Joe Talbot A young black man tries to reclaim his childhood home, a Victorian house built by his grandfather, in a gentrified neighborhood of San Francisco. [175][176]
July 3, 2019 Midsommar Ari Aster A group of friends travels to Sweden for a festival that occurs once every 90 years, only to find themselves in the clutches of a Scandinavian pagan cult. [177][178]
July 12, 2019 The Farewell Lulu Wang After learning their grandmother has only a short while left to live, a Chinese-American family decides not to tell her and schedules a family gathering before she dies. [179][180]
July 26, 2019 Skin Guy Nattiv Neo-Nazi skinhead Bryon Widner decides to leave the white supremacist movement. North American co-distribution with DirecTV only [181][182]
July 27, 2019 Share Pippa Bianco A 16-year-old discovers a disturbing video of her unconscious self from a night she does not remember and is ostracized while trying to figure out what happened. Also produced by A24; distributed by HBO Films [183][184]
September 27, 2019 The Death of Dick Long Daniel Scheinert Two men refuse to disclose the cause of death of a friend. Also produced by A24 [185][186]
October 4, 2019 Low Tide Kevin McMullin Two brothers find a bag of gold coins and try to hide it from their unpredictable friends. U.S. co-distribution with DirecTV only [187][188]
October 18, 2019 The Lighthouse Robert Eggers In the 1890s, two lighthouse keepers stranded on a New England island outpost descend into madness. Also produced by A24 [189][190]
The Elephant Queen Victoria Stone and Mark Deeble A documentary about a mother elephant protecting her herd. Co-distributed with Apple TV+ [191][192]
October 25, 2019 The Kill Team Dan Krauss A U.S. Army recruit stationed in Afghanistan faces a dilemma when his platoon participates in murdering civilians under the command of a sadistic sergeant. North American distribution only [193][194]
November 15, 2019 Waves Trey Edward Shults A suburban family navigates the aftermath of a tragedy. Also produced by A24 [195][196]
December 6, 2019 In Fabric Peter Strickland A haunted red dress torments its various owners. North American distribution only [197][198]
December 13, 2019 Uncut Gems Safdie brothers A jeweler in New York City must retrieve a precious gem to pay off his gambling debts. Also produced by A24 [199][200]

2020s

[edit]
Release date[a] Title Director(s) Synopsis Notes Ref.
March 6, 2020 First Cow Kelly Reichardt In the 1820s, a chef and a Chinese immigrant secretly milk a cow to make baked goods. [201][202]
August 14, 2020 Boys State Jesse Moss and Amanda McBaine A documentary about a thousand teenage boys who gather at a summer camp in Texas to form a mock government. Co-distributed with Apple TV+ [203][204]
October 2, 2020 On the Rocks Sofia Coppola A father and daughter harbor suspicions about the fidelity of her husband. [205][206]
January 29, 2021 Saint Maud Rose Glass A pious nurse becomes obsessed with saving a patient's soul. North American distribution only [207][208]
February 12, 2021 Minari Lee Isaac Chung A family of South Korean immigrants moves to a farm in Arkansas during the 1980s. Also produced by A24 [209][210]
June 25, 2021 False Positive John Lee A woman suspects something sinister about her pregnancy after her husband has his former teacher inseminate her. Produced by A24; distributed by Hulu [211][212]
June 30, 2021 Zola Janicza Bravo A part-time stripper embarks on a road trip to Florida. Also produced by A24 [213][214]
July 23, 2021 Val Leo Scott and Ting Poo A documentary about American actor Val Kilmer. Produced by A24; distributed by Amazon Studios [215][216]
July 30, 2021 The Green Knight David Lowery The nephew of King Arthur named Gawain sets out on a journey to test his courage and face the Green Knight. Also produced by A24 [217][218]
October 8, 2021 Lamb Valdimar Jóhannsson A couple in rural Iceland parents a humanoid lamb. North American distribution only [219][220]
October 29, 2021 The Souvenir Part II Joanna Hogg A sequel to The Souvenir, a film student making her graduation project deals with the aftermath of a relationship. [221][222]
November 19, 2021 C'mon C'mon Mike Mills A radio journalist bonds with his young nephew over a cross-country trip. Also produced by A24 [222][223]
November 24, 2021 The Humans Stephen Karam A family gathers for a Thanksgiving dinner in a broken-down flat. Also produced by A24; co-distributed with Showtime [224][225]
December 10, 2021 Red Rocket Sean Baker A middle-aged, newly retired porn star leaves Los Angeles for his Texas hometown. North American distribution only [226][227]
December 25, 2021 The Tragedy of Macbeth Joel Coen After a supernatural prophecy, Macbeth sets out to become the King of Scotland. Also produced by A24; co-distributed with Apple TV+ [228][229]
February 11, 2022 The Sky Is Everywhere Josephine Decker A shy musical prodigy grieves the death of her outgoing older sister. Co-distributed with Apple TV+ [230][231]
March 4, 2022 After Yang Kogonada A family tries to repair their android son after he becomes unresponsive. Also produced by A24; co-distributed with Showtime [232][233]
March 18, 2022 X Ti West The cast and crew of a porn film find themselves in danger while at a secluded farmhouse owned by a World War II veteran and his wife. Also produced by A24 [234][235]
March 25, 2022 Everything Everywhere All at Once Dan Kwan and Daniel Scheinert A Chinese-American immigrant leaps between parallel universes to save the multiverse. [236][237]
May 20, 2022 Men Alex Garland Strange men torment a widowed woman on vacation in the English countryside. [238][239]
May 27, 2022 Elizabeth: A Portrait in Parts Roger Michell A documentary about Queen Elizabeth II. Distributed by Showtime [240][241]
June 24, 2022 Marcel the Shell with Shoes On Dean Fleischer Camp A documentarian helps a 1-inch-tall (2.5 cm), anthropomorphic seashell search for its family. North American distribution only [242][243]
August 5, 2022 Bodies Bodies Bodies Halina Reijn A murder transpires during a hurricane party between young, backstabbing Gen-Zers. Also produced by A24 [243][244]
August 26, 2022 Funny Pages Owen Kline A teenage cartoonist works for a possibly unstable former cartoonist. [245][246]
September 16, 2022 Pearl Ti West A prequel to X that follows the aspiring titular actress on the brink of madness. [247][248]
September 22, 2022 Instinct Halina Reijn A prison therapist becomes obsessed with a serial rapist on the verge of being paroled. [249]
September 30, 2022 God's Creatures Saela Davis and Anna Rose Holmer In a close-knit fishing village, a mother lies to protect her son from a serious allegation. Also produced by A24 [250][251]
October 14, 2022 Stars at Noon Claire Denis An American journalist stranded in Nicaragua amid governmental instability falls in love with a British man. North American distribution only [252][253]
October 21, 2022 Aftersun Charlotte Wells A woman reminisces about a childhood summer vacation with her father. [254][255]
October 28, 2022 Causeway Lila Neugebauer A US soldier sustains a traumatic brain injury and struggles to readjust to civilian life. Produced by A24; co-distributed with Apple TV+ [256][257]
November 18, 2022 The Inspection Elegance Bratton At boot camp, the sexual orientation of a black man makes him the target of hazing from a drill instructor and a fellow recruit. Also produced by A24 [258][259]
November 25, 2022 White Noise Noah Baumbach An American family and the colleague of the patriarch evacuate after an environmental disaster. Produced by A24; distributed by Netflix [260][261]
December 2, 2022 Close Lukas Dhont A rift forms between two teenage boys when their close relationship is commented on. North American distribution only [262][263]
The Eternal Daughter Joanna Hogg A filmmaker takes her elderly mother to a secluded hotel. [264][265]
December 9, 2022 The Whale Darren Aronofsky A morbidly obese, reclusive English teacher tries to reconnect with his teenage daughter. Also produced by A24 [266][267]
December 30, 2022 This Place Rules Andrew Callaghan A documentary about a traveling interviewer who asks Americans about politics. Produced by A24; distributed by HBO [268][269]
January 20, 2023 When You Finish Saving the World Jesse Eisenberg The contentious relationship between a high schooler pursuing music and his mother, who runs a shelter for domestic abuse survivors. Also produced by A24 [270][271]
February 10, 2023 Sharper Benjamin Caron Nonlinear vignettes on the manipulations and power struggles surrounding characters in Manhattan. Also produced by A24; co-distributed with Apple TV+ [272][273]
March 14, 2023 Pi Darren Aronofsky A paranoid mathematician trying to predict stock market patterns discovers a string of numbers that may explain the theory of everything. 25th anniversary re-release; originally distributed by Artisan Entertainment [274]
April 7, 2023 Showing Up Kelly Reichardt A sculptor preparing an exhibition finds inspiration in daily life. Also produced by A24 [275][276]
April 14, 2023 Beau Is Afraid Ari Aster A mild-mannered man goes on a surrealistic odyssey while trying to visit his mother. [277][278]
May 26, 2023 You Hurt My Feelings Nicole Holofcener A novelist overhears the honest reaction to her latest book from her husband. U.S. distribution only [279][280]
June 2, 2023 Past Lives Celine Song Two childhood friends reunite after two decades apart. Also produced by A24 [280][281]
July 7, 2023 Earth Mama Savanah Leaf A single mother with two children in foster care navigates her latest pregnancy. [282][283]
July 19, 2023 The Deepest Breath Laura McGann A documentary about Italian freediver Alessia Zecchini. Produced by A24; distributed by Netflix [284][285]
July 21, 2023 Stephen Curry: Underrated Peter Nicks A documentary about American basketball player Stephen Curry. Produced by A24; distributed by Apple TV+ [286][287]
July 28, 2023 Talk to Me Danny and Michael Philippou A group of friends conjure spirits using an embalmed hand. North American distribution only [280][288]
August 11, 2023 Medusa Deluxe Thomas Hardiman An assortment of hairstylists gather for a hairdressing competition, where one of them is murdered. [289][290]
September 22, 2023 Stop Making Sense Jonathan Demme A concert film by the American rock band Talking Heads. Re-release; originally distributed by Cinecom Pictures and Island Alive [291]
October 6, 2023 Dicks: The Musical Larry Charles God narrates the story of identical twins separated at birth and how they switch places to reunite their divorced parents. Also produced by A24 [292]
October 27, 2023 Priscilla Sofia Coppola A biopic about Priscilla Presley and her complicated romantic relationship with Elvis Presley. North American distribution only [293][294]
November 3, 2023 All Dirt Roads Taste of Salt Raven Jackson The life of a black woman in Mississippi from childhood to adulthood. Also produced by A24 [295][296]
November 10, 2023 Dream Scenario Kristoffer Borgli A professor becomes an overnight celebrity after appearing in everyone's dreams. [297]
December 15, 2023 The Zone of Interest Jonathan Glazer Nazi concentration camp commandant Rudolf Höss, his wife Hedwig, and their family go about their day while living in a house next to the Auschwitz concentration camp. [298]
December 22, 2023 The Iron Claw Sean Durkin Fritz Von Erich and his sons form a wrestling family later plagued by an assortment of misfortunes. [299]
December 25, 2023 Occupied City Steve McQueen A documentary set in present-day Amsterdam traces where occupying Nazi forces committed atrocities against Jewish people during World War II. [300][301]
January 12, 2024 My Mercury Joelle Chesselet and Philippa Ehrlich A documentary about the conservationist Yves Chesselet, who aims to save endangered seabirds. Produced by A24; distributed by Amazon Prime Video [302]
January 23, 2024 Open Wide Sara Goldblatt A documentary about orthodontists John and Mike Mew, who created mewing. Produced by A24; distributed by Netflix [303]
February 14, 2024 Jerry Lee Lewis: Trouble in Mind Ethan Coen A documentary about American singer-songwriter Jerry Lee Lewis. Produced by A24; distributed by Amazon Prime Video [304][305]
March 1, 2024 Problemista Julio Torres An aspiring Salvadoran toy designer works for a demanding art critic, hoping to realize his dreams before his work visa expires. Also produced by A24 [306][307]
March 8, 2024 Love Lies Bleeding Rose Glass A bodybuilder falls in love with a gym manager with a criminal father. [308][309]
March 29, 2024 Steve! (Martin): A Documentary in 2 Pieces Morgan Neville A two-part documentary film about American entertainer Steve Martin. Produced by A24; distributed by Apple TV+ [310][311]
April 12, 2024 Civil War Alex Garland A team of war journalists travel to Washington, D.C. after a civil war erupts in the US. Also produced by A24 [312]
May 3, 2024 I Saw the TV Glow Jane Schoenbrun Reality blurs for two teenagers who bond over a mysterious television show. [313][314]
The Sixth Andrea Nix Fine and Sean Fine A documentary about the January 6 United States Capitol attack. Produced by A24; video on demand release [315]
June 7, 2024 Tuesday Daina O. Pusić A mother and her terminally ill daughter meet Death in the form of a talking scarlet macaw. Also produced by A24 [316][317]
June 21, 2024 Janet Planet Annie Baker The coming-of-age of an 11-year-old living with her mother in Massachusetts, 1991. [318][319]
July 5, 2024 MaXXXine Ti West A sequel to X that follows adult film star-turned-actress Maxine Minx as a serial killer targets the starlets of Hollywood in 1980s Los Angeles. [320][321]
July 12, 2024 Sing Sing Greg Kwedar A group of prisoners inside Sing Sing Correctional Facility, a maximum security prison, form a theater group and stage an original production. U.S. distribution only [322][323]
September 6, 2024 The Front Room The Eggers Brothers A pregnant woman watches over her deceptive mother-in-law. Also produced by A24 [324][325]
Look into My Eyes Lana Wilson A documentary about psychics in New York City. [326][327]
September 20, 2024 A Different Man Aaron Schimberg A man with neurofibromatosis who undergoes facial reconstructive surgery becomes fixated on the actor playing him in a production based on his former life. [328][325]
October 11, 2024 The Last of the Sea Women Sue Kim A documentary about haenyeo, South Korean fisherwomen. Produced by A24; distributed by Apple TV+ [329][330]
We Live in Time John Crowley A chance encounter ignites a relationship between a chef and a recent divorcé. North American distribution only [331][325]
November 8, 2024 Heretic Scott Beck and Bryan Woods A man traps two Mormon missionaries inside his maze-like home. Also produced by A24 [332][333]
November 27, 2024 Queer Luca Guadagnino In 1940s Mexico City, an American expat becomes infatuated with a young discharged Navy serviceman. U.S. distribution only [334][335]
December 6, 2024 Y2K Kyle Mooney In an alternate reality where the year 2000 problem happens, two friends crash a New Year's Eve party. Also produced by A24 [336][337]
December 20, 2024 The Brutalist Brady Corbet A Hungarian-born Jewish architect who survived the Holocaust emigrates to the United States to achieve the American Dream. U.S. distribution only [338][335]
December 25, 2024 Babygirl Halina Reijn A high-ranking CEO has an affair with a young intern. Also produced by A24 [339][340]
February 7, 2025 Parthenope Paolo Sorrentino Parthenope searches for happiness while falling in love with her home city of Naples. North American distribution only [341][342]
March 7, 2025 On Becoming a Guinea Fowl Rungano Nyoni Shula and her cousins uncover the secrets of their middle-class Zambian family after their uncle's death. Also produced by A24 [343][344]
March 14, 2025 Opus Mark Anthony Green A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a pop star who mysteriously disappeared. [345]
March 28, 2025 Death of a Unicorn Alex Scharfman A lawyer and his daughter accidentally kill a baby unicorn en route to a weekend family retreat. [346]
April 11, 2025 Warfare Ray Mendoza and Alex Garland Follows a platoon of Navy SEALs on a mission through insurgent territory in 2006. [347][348]
April 18, 2025 The Legend of Ochi Isaiah Saxon A farm girl embarks on a quest to return a baby primate-like creature to its kind. [349][350]
May 9, 2025 Friendship Andrew DeYoung A suburban father attempts to make an adult male friend with his new neighbor. North American distribution only [351][352]
May 30, 2025 Bring Her Back Danny and Michael Philippou A brother and his stepsister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother. [353][354]
June 13, 2025 Materialists Celine Song A New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex. [355][356]
June 27, 2025 Sorry, Baby Eva Victor A college professor tries to recover from a sexual assault. [357][358]
July 18, 2025 Eddington Ari Aster In 2020, tensions rise in Eddington, New Mexico, as a stand-off ensues between a sheriff and a mayor. Also produced by A24 [359][360]
August 1, 2025 Architecton Victor Kossakovsky A documentary about architecture. [361][362]
August 15, 2025 Highest 2 Lowest Spike Lee A ransom plot puts a titan music mogul in a moral dilemma. Produced by A24; distributed by Apple TV+ [363][364]
August 22, 2025 Ne Zha 2 Jiaozi The rebellious, powerful Ne Zha faces an ancient force intent on destroying humanity. English dubbed version; North American, Australian and New Zealand co-distribution with CMC Pictures only [365][366]
October 3, 2025 The Smashing Machine Benny Safdie A biopic about Mark Kerr, an American MMA fighter. Also produced by A24 [367][368]
October 10, 2025 If I Had Legs I'd Kick You Mary Bronstein A mother's life unravels as she navigates her child's mysterious illness and an absent husband. [369][370]
November 26, 2025 Eternity David Freyne In the afterlife, when asked who she wants to spend eternity with, a woman must choose between her first love and her husband. [371][372]
December 25, 2025 Marty Supreme Josh Safdie In 1952, table tennis player Marty Mauser hustles for the opportunity to become world champion. [373][374]
January 30, 2026 The Moment Aidan Zamiri A mockumentary about Charli XCX gearing up to lead her first headlining tour. [375][376]
February 6, 2026 Pillion Harry Lighton A man enters a submissive relationship with a biker. U.S. distribution only [377]
February 20, 2026 How to Make a Killing John Patton Ford Becket Redfellow decides to murder every relative who stands between him and the family fortune. [378][379]
March 6, 2026 André Is an Idiot Tony Benna A documentary about André Ricciardi, who receives a terminal cancer diagnosis. Produced by A24; distributed by Joint Venture [380]
March 13, 2026 Undertone Ian Tuason A horror podcast host receives recordings of paranormal noises from a pregnant couple whose experiences mirror her own. [381]
March 20, 2026 Marc by Sofia Sofia Coppola A documentary about American fashion designer Marc Jacobs. Also produced by A24 [382]
April 3, 2026 The Drama Kristoffer Borgli An engaged couple's impending wedding unravels after the bride reveals a secret from her past. [383][384]
April 17, 2026 Mother Mary David Lowery A pop star reunites with her former costume designer. [385][386]
May 29, 2026 Backrooms Kane Parsons A furniture store owner finds an entrance to an impossibly large complex of empty rooms. [387]
June 19, 2026 The Death of Robin Hood Michael Sarnoski A critically injured Robin Hood reflects on his criminal, murderous past. North American distribution only [388]
June 26, 2026 The Invite Olivia Wilde A couple in a failing marriage invites their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for dinner, only for the night to be thrown into a tailspin by awkward conversations and shocking revelations. U.S. distribution only [389]

Upcoming

[edit]

Scheduled films

[edit]
Release date[a] Title Director Synopsis Notes Ref.
August 7, 2026 Tony Matt Johnson 19-year-old Anthony Bourdain takes a summer job at a restaurant in Cape Cod. Also produced by A24 [390][391]
September 4, 2026 Onslaught Adam Wingard A mother fights rogue super soldiers who escaped a secret military base. [392]
September 18, 2026 Primetime Lance Oppenheim Television journalist Chris Hansen debuts To Catch a Predator in 2006. [393][394]
November 6, 2026 Club Kid Jordan Firstman A washed-up party promoter is forced to look after a son he never knew he had. [395]
December 11, 2026 The Debut Jesse Eisenberg A shy woman is unexpectedly cast in a local production of an original musical. [396][397]
March 3, 2028 Elden Ring Alex Garland In the Lands Between, shards of the shattered Elden Ring are divided among corrupted demigods. Also produced by A24 [398][399]

Notes

[edit]
  1. 1 2 3 The listed date refers to the film's limited or wide theatrical release in the United States by A24, not necessarily its first screening or when it premiered.
